description_long: This is a modern laptop with a slim, rectangular profile and a matte black exterior casing. The keyboard is full-sized with a standard QWERTY layout, featuring a large touchpad below the keys. The screen is open and displays an image of two dinosaurs in a desert-like environment, and a small dinosaur figurine is positioned on the left side of the laptop, partially on the keyboard and extending outward. The laptop's hinge is sturdy, and the display bezel is thin, maximizing the visible screen area. The overall design is sleek and minimalistic, with no visible brand logos or stickers on the exterior surfaces.
description: A sleek, matte black laptop with a full keyboard and a screen displaying dinosaurs, accompanied by a small dinosaur figurine on the side.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open laptop with the dinosaur figurine perched on the left edge of the keyboard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the plain matte black lid and the dinosaur figurine's tail extending from the left side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the dinosaur figurine facing forward on the right edge of the keyboard.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the full keyboard, large touchpad, open screen with dinosaur imagery, and the dinosaur figurine on the left.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and on, displaying an image of dinosaurs in a desert environment.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and large touchpad; no numeric keypad visible.
